title: 4-H YOUTH DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: OSU EXTENSION SERVICE 4-H YOUTH DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the opportunity for learning experiences that promote positive interactions with adults and peers. Individuals can learn about rocketry, robotics, entomology, honey bees, forestry, art, conservation, and more. 118 Ballard Hall Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Grades kindergarten-12 Hours: No standard hours (541) 737-2713 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 737-2713 Main phone INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by activity DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps Youth Agricultural Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HOME FOOD SAFETY AND PRESERVATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
